channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NILACHAL] SFAL Acquires 0.216% Stake in Nilachal Refractories
item.description:
SFAL Speciality Alloys Ltd acquired 44,000 equity shares of Nilachal Refractories Limited, representing a 0.216% stake. This acquisition increases SFAL's total shareholding in Nilachal Refractories to 1,43,77,522 shares, or 70.61% of the total share capital. The acquisition was executed through an inter-se transfer as per the Share Purchase Agreement dated March 11, 2026, with the acquisition date being April 29, 2026.

  • SFAL acquired 44,000 shares of Nilachal Refractories.
  • The acquisition represents a 0.216% stake in the company.
  • SFAL's total holding in Nilachal Refractories is now 70.61%.
  • The acquisition occurred via inter-se transfer on April 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [NILACHAL] SFAL Acquires 44,000 Shares of Nilachal Refractories
item.description:
SFAL Speciality Alloys Ltd acquired 44,000 equity shares of Nilachal Refractories Limited through an inter-se transfer, increasing its shareholding to 70.40%. The acquisition was made pursuant to a Share Purchase Agreement dated March 11, 2026. Post-acquisition, SFAL holds 1,43,33,522 shares in Nilachal Refractories. The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • SFAL acquired 44,000 shares of Nilachal Refractories.
  • SFAL's holding in Nilachal Refractories increased to 70.40%.
  • The acquisition was an inter-se transfer via Share Purchase Agreement.
  • The disclosure was made under SEBI Takeover Regulations.
  • The equity share capital of TC after acquisition is ₹20,36,14,500.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [GUJCONT] Gujarat Containers: FY26 Audited Results Approved
item.description:
Gujarat Containers Ltd. announced the approval of its audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board approved a dividend of 15% (₹1.50 per share) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the AGM, payable by September 12, 2026. The 34th AGM will be held on August 14, 2026, via video conferencing. The register of members and share transfer books will be closed from August 7 to August 14, 2026. The company also reappointed internal and cost auditors for the year 2026-27 and will seek shareholder approval for the cost auditor's remuneration.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board.
  • Dividend of 15% (₹1.50/share) declared, subject to AGM approval.
  • 34th AGM scheduled for August 14, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Register of Members and Share Transfer Books closure from August 7-14, 2026.
  • Reappointment of internal and cost auditors for the year 2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT CONTAINERS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [INDIASHLTR] India Shelter Finance FY26 PAT at ₹503 Crs, Up 33% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

India Shelter Finance Corporation Ltd reported a 29% YoY growth in Gross AUM, reaching ₹11,044 Crs as of Q4FY26. The company's PAT for FY26 stood at ₹503 Crs, a 33% increase YoY. The Board of Directors has recommended a final dividend of ₹10 per share. The company added 41 new branches during the year, expanding its network to 307 branches across 15 states. Asset quality improved with Gross Stage 3 at 1.2% and Net Stage 3 at 0.9% as of March 31, 2026.

  • Gross AUM grew by 29% YoY to ₹11,044 Crs in Q4FY26.
  • PAT for FY26 reached ₹503 Crs, reflecting a 33% YoY growth.
  • The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹10 per share.
  • Company's Networth stands at ₹3,198 Crs as of March'26.
  • Gross Stage 3 improved to 1.2% and Net Stage 3 to 0.9% as of March’26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: India Shelter Finance Corporation Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GUJCONT] Gujarat Containers: FY26 Audited Results Approved; 15% Dividend
item.description:
Gujarat Containers Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and declared a dividend of 15% (₹1.50 per share), subject to shareholder approval at the AGM, payable by September 12, 2026. The 34th AGM will be held on August 14, 2026, via video conferencing. The register of members and share transfer books will be closed from August 7 to August 14, 2026. The board also approved the reappointment of internal and cost auditors and will seek shareholder approval for the cost auditor's remuneration. The appointment of a new firm of practicing company secretaries will be decided in an adjourned board meeting.

  • Audited FY26 financial results approved by the board.
  • Dividend of 15% (₹1.50/share) declared, subject to AGM approval.
  • 34th AGM scheduled for August 14, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Register of Members and Share Transfer Books closed from August 7-14, 2026.
  • Reappointment of internal and cost auditors approved for 2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT CONTAINERS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IGL] Indraprastha Gas: T. Rowe Price Reduces Stake to 2.97%
item.description:
T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc. and its affiliates disclosed a change in their shareholding of Indraprastha Gas Ltd. (IGL) under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Through open market sales, their holding decreased from 3.683% to 2.971% of the total share/voting capital. The transaction occurred on April 29, 2026, with the disclosure made on April 30, 2026. The equity share capital of IGL remains at 1,400,001,600 shares before and after the sale.

  • T. Rowe Price's stake in Indraprastha Gas decreased to 2.971%.
  • 9,973,151 shares were sold via open market.
  • The transaction was executed on April 29, 2026.
  • Equity share capital of Indraprastha Gas remains unchanged at 1,400,001,600 shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDRAPRASTHA GAS LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [MOL] Meghmani Organics: Amalgamation Meeting Schedule Correction
item.description:
Meghmani Organics Ltd. announced a correction to the schedule of meetings for secured and unsecured creditors as part of the Scheme of Amalgamation. The meetings, initially announced on May 1, 2026, had a typographical error. The corrected schedule, as directed by the Hon’ble NCLT, sets all meetings for June 6, 2026, via video conferencing. The schedules for Kilburn Chemicals Limited and Meghmani Crop Nutrition Limited remain unchanged.

  • Meghmani Organics corrects meeting schedule for creditor meetings.
  • Meetings for equity, secured, and unsecured creditors are now on June 6, 2026.
  • Meetings will be held via video conferencing.
  • Schedules for Kilburn Chemicals and Meghmani Crop Nutrition remain unchanged.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meghmani Organics Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [MEDIASSIST] Medi Assist: MIT & 238 Plan Cross 5% Threshold
item.description:
Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) and 238 Plan Associates LLC have collectively crossed the 5% threshold in Medi Assist Healthcare Services Limited, triggering Regulation 29(1) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. MIT acquired 38,000 shares and 238 Plan acquired 12,000 shares on April 29, 2026. Following the acquisition, MIT holds 3.92% (2,928,830 shares) and 238 Plan holds 1.10% (822,170 shares), bringing their combined holding to 5.02% (3,751,000 shares). The acquisitions were made through open market purchases.

  • MIT and 238 Plan collectively hold 5.02% of Medi Assist post-acquisition.
  • MIT acquired 38,000 shares, and 238 Plan acquired 12,000 shares on April 29, 2026.
  • The acquisitions triggered SEBI's Takeover Regulations due to crossing the 5% threshold.
  • The acquisitions were executed through open market purchases.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Medi Assist Healthcare Services Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [DABUR] Dabur India: Sesa Care Amalgamation Scheme Meeting Held
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dabur India Ltd. convened meetings for equity shareholders and unsecured creditors on May 02, 2026, as per the NCLT order dated March 12, 2026, to approve the Scheme of Amalgamation between Sesa Care Private Limited and Dabur India Limited. The meetings, held via video conferencing, included discussions on the scheme's salient features, shareholder questions, and e-voting opportunities. Dr. Shashank Saksena chaired the equity shareholders' meeting, while Mr. Pratish Sinha served as the scrutinizer.

  • Dabur India held meetings for equity shareholders and unsecured creditors on May 02, 2026.
  • The meetings addressed the Scheme of Amalgamation between Sesa Care and Dabur.
  • Shareholders and creditors discussed the scheme and voted via e-voting.
  • The meetings were held via video conferencing pursuant to NCLT order.
  • Dr. Shashank Saksena chaired the equity shareholders' meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DABUR INDIA LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [JIYAECO] Jiya Eco-Products: 14th Annual Report for FY 2024-25
item.description:
Jiya Eco-Products Ltd has released its 14th Annual Report for the financial year 2024-25. The report includes company information, notice of the AGM to be held on December 15, 2025, statutory reports, board's report, corporate governance report, and standalone and consolidated financial statements. The AGM will cover the adoption of audited financial statements, appointment of directors, and appointment of statutory auditors.

  • 14th Annual General Meeting scheduled for December 15, 2025.
  • Adoption of audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for FY 2024-25.
  • Appointment of M/s D R B S V and Associates as Statutory Auditors.
  • Re-appointment of Mrs. Rajashri Pradeep Khandagale as Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jiya Eco-Products Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM
